description.en: Know Your Customer banking platform for Natixis. Spring Boot backend with Angular frontend, handling secure customer verification workflows.
description.pt: Plataforma bancária Know Your Customer para Natixis. Backend Spring Boot com frontend Angular, processando workflows seguros de verificação de clientes.
description.fr: Plateforme bancaire Know Your Customer pour Natixis. Backend Spring Boot avec frontend Angular, gestion des workflows sécurisés de vérification clients.
